versions.version_description: I started with the tab submitted byKurt1964 then transposed it to G so that some missing chords could easily be played. PLEASE NOTE: For Gaug -use a cowboy G chord but hit the Eb on the D string with your index finger. For FAF - play an F chord on the high EBGD strings but leave the B string open. Play the G7 by moving the index finger up one space to E on the D string. Em/Eb just play an Em and drop the E on the D string to an Eb. Em7 just l=eave the D string open and hit the B on the A string. Em/C# play an E on the D string and a C# on the A string. For Cadd9 just hit the C on the B string and leave the rest open. .
A version convenient for guitar players in the original key (with capo at 1st fret) also has Intro and Outro parts.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
BROKEN HEARTED ME
by Anne Murray

https://youtu.be/SwDSF_Fb_s4


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Every now and then I cry[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Every night you keep staying on my mind[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
All my friends say I'll survive[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]
But I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can if it's broken all apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]D7[/ch]
A million miracles could never stop the pain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together again[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]
No I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
And when you hear this song I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken hearted me[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Every day is just the same[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C7[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Playing games, different lovers different names[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
They keep saying I'll survive[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]
But I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can if it's broken all apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]D7[/ch]
A million miracles could never stop the pain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together again[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G7[/ch]
No I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]E7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
And when you hear this song I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken hearted[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Time won't heal a broken hearted me[/tab]
